title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same capabilities as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer; use Ollama models as LangChain LLMs or chat models with tools, memory, RAG, etc.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style); supports multi-user, RAG, plugins, Docker one-liner.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, async calls, Spring Boot starters available.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple idiomatic interface to chat and generate completions.

title: ollama-cli-copilot
summary: Terminal copilot powered by Ollama; explain shell commands, generate scripts, inline chat.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension: highlight code → right-click → ask Ollama to explain, refactor, document.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and model preload.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and compose examples for Ollama server.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chatbot UI for Ollama with Vercel edge runtime, Tailwind, and server-sent events.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain; ingest PDFs, ask questions locally.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Experimental multi-agent framework on top of Ollama; agents can call tools and delegate subtasks.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official NPM package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings to the Ollama local API.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package; install via pip to chat, generate, embed with any Ollama model.

title: r/ollama - Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit for announcements, troubleshooting, and showcasing projects built on Ollama.

title: ollama-hackernews-discussion
summary: Hacker News thread discussing the launch of Ollama 0.1 with benchmarks vs. llama.cpp.

title: ollama-youtube-walkthrough
summary: Video tutorial covering installation, model pulling, and building a RAG chatbot with Ollama and LangChain.
